message:
br-bd-fnvov add permission + invalid-target CLI E2E tests

Complements existing malformed-image coverage (truncated / corrupted
superblock / zero-filled / random-garbage) with three permission and
invalid-target paths:
- cli_inspect_unreadable_image_reports_permission_error: chmod 0o000
  must surface EACCES-hinted diagnostic; skips cleanly if the process
  bypasses mode-0 reads (e.g. root).
- cli_inspect_directory_as_image_reports_error: pointing `ffs inspect`
  at a directory exits non-zero with a diagnostic.
- cli_inspect_empty_file_reports_error: zero-byte input surfaces an
  error instead of panicking or mis-detecting a format.

All three emit SCENARIO_RESULT structured logs and pass locally.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
